arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to rival Chelsea and Tottenham for 'complete' youngster
arts.sum: Aston Villa look set to compete with Premier League rivals Chelsea, Newcastle United, and Tottenham Hotspur for one of Belgium's hottest prospects after'stunning' start to the season. Smets would join up with the growing Belgian contingent at Villa Park, playing alongside compatriots Amadou Onana and Youri Tielemans.

arts.ttl: Southampton manager responds to Aston Villa interest in breakout star
arts.sum: Saints boss Martin has responded to those links as he looks to keep hold of a player who will be crucial if his club is to put up a serious fight for Premier League survival this season. Tyler Dibling has been one of the few bright sparks in Martin's side who have struggled in the Premier League so far this season, currently lying at the foot of the table with just five points from 14 games.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa icon Gary Shaw died after banging head following night out drinking, inquest hears
arts.sum: Aston Vila paid emotional tribute to Gary Shaw in September after his death and it has now been revealed what caused the 19882 European Cup winner's shock passing after an inquest

arts.ttl: Unai Emery suggests Arsenal structure wasn’t as strong as Aston Villa – Opens up in Spanish interview
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s only England experience before Aston Villa was his mixed spell with Arsenal. The Spaniard was in charge at Arsenal from the summer of 2018 to November 2019, and in his first season, he helped the Gunners finish fifth and make it to the Europa League final. The Aston Villa boss has been speaking The post Unai Emery suggests Arsenal structure wasn’t as strong as Aston Villa – Opens up in Spanish interview appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa join transfer race for £29m outcast from European rivals
arts.sum: Fagioli has already made an appearance at Villa Park this season, coming on for four minutes in Emery's side's recent goalless draw with the Old Lady in the Champions League. He could provide great depth in the centre of the park for Villa who look to compete on both a domestic and European front this season.

arts.ttl: Load up on Liverpool and Villa - FPL tips & team of week
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is a no brainer as captain this week, writes Thomas Woods, and he is joined by two Liverpool team-mates in the FPL team of the week.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all five games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 15 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all five games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: There were days when I wondered if I would ever play for Aston Villa again
arts.sum: "It also means I have seen way worse in the last 16, 17 months than bad days in football, which means I can contextualise it a little bit and means I am very calm after a loss of bad performance. Tyrone Mings has admitted there were times when he didn't think he would be able to recover from his knee injury due to the severity of it.
